name: Black Angus Garlic-Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the French bread loaf into halves horizontally.
2. Mix together butter, shredded Asiago cheese, shredded jack cheese, mayonnaise, chopped green onions, and pureed garlic in a bowl until well combined.
3. Spread the mixture evenly on the cut sides of the bread halves.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 7 minutes.
5. Place under the broiler for an additional 3 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Cut into slices and serve.
